actions.name: Hooves
actions.description: Melee Attack Roll: +4, reach 5 ft. Hit: 4 (1d4 + 2) Bludgeoning damage.

tactical_info.combat_role: Mount - Small riding animal with basic defensive capability
tactical_info.positioning: Primarily non-combat, uses hoof attacks when threatened
tactical_info.damage_output: 4 bludgeoning per hit, modest defensive strikes
tactical_info.key_abilities: Good speed (40 ft), suitable mount size
tactical_info.weaknesses: Low AC and combat training, primarily utility creature
tactical_info.synergies: Perfect for young riders, light cavalry, and personal transport
